trading_rules.news_trading_note: News trading permitted on all sessions
trading_rules.ea_restrictions: Manual trading only; automated/EA trading prohibited
trading_rules.copy_trading_restrictions: Not confirmed; verify directly with firm
prohibited_strategies: Any strategy that manipulates or exploits the simulation environment

payout_structure.profit_split_detail: Fixed split chosen at signup; 55% lower cost entry, 80% higher cost entry. No tiered progression.
payout_structure.consistency_note: No consistency rules once funded — major differentiator
payout_structure.forty_pct_rule_note: Best single day must not exceed 40% of total profits in funded stage only

🎯 COMPARISON SCORECARD._note: Flat 38-metric scorecard. Every field required. Use null if genuinely unknown. Powers side-by-side firm comparisons.

pricing.cheapest_account_model: Standard Evaluation 100K NYC 55% (15% off via propfirmmatch.com)

key_differentiators: No consistency rules once funded — rare in the industry
Daily on-demand payouts with no payout caps
EOD drawdown locks at starting balance — never trails up, giving growing accounts permanent cushion
Up to 5 funded accounts with $1.5M total capital exposure
Zero fees once funded — monthly subscription stops at funded stage
No activation fee on any account size
1% profit threshold for daily payout requests — very accessible
potential_concerns: Monthly subscription model during evaluation — slow evaluators accumulate more cost
EA/automated trading prohibited — manual trading only
Small review base (61 Trustpilot reviews) — limited track record at scale
NYC session disallows overnight holding — not suitable for swing traders on that session
Minimum account size $100K — no small starter accounts for newer traders
40% single-day rule in funded stage limits blow-out day strategies
Restricted countries list not publicly enumerated — eligibility unclear for many regions
Only 3 platforms offered — less variety than many competitors

red_flags.detail: Only 61 Trustpilot reviews as of March 2026. Positive but limited track record at scale.
Unlike one-time fee firms, you pay monthly until funded. Slow evaluators accumulate more cost.
NYC session traders must close all positions by 4:00 PM ET. Not suitable for swing traders on this session.
Manual trading only. No automated strategies permitted.
Only $100K, $200K, $300K options. No smaller entry points for newer traders under $100K.
No single trading day's profit can exceed 40% of total cumulative profits in the funded account. Limits blow-out day strategies.
T&C references OFAC/sanctions compliance but no named country list is published. Traders must confirm eligibility directly with firm.

🔴 RED FLAGS & CONSIDERATIONS.restricted_countries_note: TBD — full official list not publicly disclosed; confirm with firm directly

💡 PRO TIPS FOR TRADERS: No consistency rules once funded is rare — take advantage of aggressive trading days without fear of disqualification
Daily payouts with no caps = fastest path to compounding real income from a prop firm
55% split at lower monthly fee vs 80% split at higher fee — do the math based on your expected monthly profit
22-Hour session allows overnight holding — better for traders who swing overnight futures positions
Scale to 5 funded accounts = $1.5M total capital — one of the highest multi-account caps in the industry
1% profit threshold to request payout means you can withdraw very small gains daily
40% rule in funded stage: no single day should exceed 40% of total profits — plan trading accordingly
No time limit on evaluation — take as long as you need without accruing reset fees
EOD drawdown does not trail up — your floor remains at your starting balance, so you never lose cushion as you grow

⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_top_one_futures: Traders Launch: Monthly fee, 55–80% split, daily payouts, no consistency rule funded, $100K–$300K. Top One Futures: One-time fee, 90% split, same-day payouts, consistency rules apply, $25K–$150K.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_apex: Traders Launch: Monthly fee, higher account sizes, no consistency funded, daily payouts. Apex: Monthly fee, up to $300K, 100% on first $25K then 90%, trailing drawdown.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.vs_topstep: Traders Launch: No consistency rule funded, daily payouts, 80% split, newer firm. Topstep: Established 2012, 90% split, biweekly payouts, consistency rules apply.
⚖️ COMPETITIVE POSITIONING.unique_advantage: No consistency rules once funded + daily payouts with no caps + up to 5 accounts ($1.5M exposure) = most flexible payout environment in the futures prop space
